statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Root of a binary tree with n nodes, where each node has an integer value.
statement.outputFormat: The lowest common ancestor of p and q.
statement.notes: You can assume the given nodes p and q are in the tree.

buggyStarterCode.python:
class Solution:
    def findLCA(self, root: TreeNode, p: int, q: int) -> int:
        if not root: return -1
        if root.val == p or root.val == q: return root.val
        left = self.findLCA(root.left, p, q)
        right = self.findLCA(root.right, p, q)
        if left != -1 and right != -1: return root.val
        return (left != -1) ? left : right

functionSignature.cpp: int findLCA(TreeNode* root, int p, int q);
functionSignature.java: int findLCA(TreeNode root, int p, int q);
functionSignature.python: def findLCA(self, root: TreeNode, p: int, q: int) -> int:
functionSignature.javascript: int findLCA(TreeNode root, int p, int q);

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def findLCA(self, root: TreeNode, p: int, q: int) -> int:
        if not root: return -1
        if root.val == p or root.val == q: return root.val
        left = self.findLCA(root.left, p, q)
        right = self.findLCA(root.right, p, q)
        if left != -1 and right != -1: return root.val
        if left != -1: return left
        return right

def find_min(node):
    if node is None:return float('inf')
    return min(node.val, find_min(node.left), find_min(node.right))

def construct_tree(arr): 
    if not arr: return None
    root = TreeNode(arr[0])
    i = 1
    q = [root]
    while q and i < len(arr):
        f = q.pop(0)
        left = arr[i];i += 1
        right = arr[i];i += 1
        f.left = TreeNode(left)
        f.right = TreeNode(right)
        q.append(f.left)
        q.append(f.right)
    return root
    
with open(0,'r') as f:
    n = int(f.readline())
    arr = [int(i) for i in f.readline().split()]
    root = construct_tree(arr)
    p = int(f.readline())
    q = int(f.readline())
    print(Solution().findLCA(root,p,q))
